title: Reestruturação do Projeto + Banco SQLite com Import Pipeline
plan: Create new directory structure (src/, src/parsers/, src/db/, src/analyzers/, src/reports/, output/) with __init__.py files
Create src/parsers/base.py with abstract base class for parsers
Extract parsing logic from poker_cash_analyzer.py and poker_tournament_analyzer.py into src/parsers/ggpoker.py (cash + tournament parsing)
Extract PokerStars parsing logic from poker_tournament_analyzer.py into src/parsers/pokerstars.py
Create src/db/schema.py with SQLite CREATE TABLE statements (hands, hand_actions, sessions, tournaments, tournament_summaries, imported_files)
Create src/db/connection.py with SQLite connection singleton
Create src/db/repository.py with CRUD operations (insert hands, query stats, file tracking)
Create src/importer.py with incremental import pipeline (ZIP extraction, parse, DB insert, file hash deduplication)
Create src/analyzers/cash.py - cash game analysis reading from SQLite instead of memory
Create src/analyzers/tournament.py - tournament analysis reading from SQLite
Create src/analyzers/spin.py - Spin & Gold cycle analysis reading from SQLite
Migrate HTML report generation from poker_cash_analyzer.py into src/reports/cash_report.py
Migrate HTML report generation from poker_tournament_analyzer.py into src/reports/tournament_report.py
Migrate HTML report generation from poker_spin_analyzer.py into src/reports/spin_report.py
Create main.py as CLI entry point with argparse subcommands: import, report, stats
Update .gitignore to include poker.db and data/
Verify HTML reports produce identical output when reading from DB
Ensure cross-platform compatibility (paths with pathlib, UTF-8 encoding)
Keep original 3 scripts + generate_reports.py as deprecated but functional
